hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *example*|*sample*|*template*) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in */.env|*/.env.*|.env|.env.*|*.pem|*/id_rsa|*/id_ed25519|*/credentials.json) echo "Blocked read of potential secrets file: $f (Security pillar — provide needed values another way)" >&2; exit 2;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] && cd "$(dirname "$f")" && npx --no-install prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" 2>/dev/null || true
